# Panda & Zozò

> Premium luxury dog walking service in Paris, covering the 6th arrondissement (Saint-Germain-des-Prés), 7th arrondissement (Invalides, Champ de Mars), and 5th arrondissement (Latin Quarter). English, French, and Italian speaking. Positive reinforcement only.

## About

Panda & Zozò provides premium, unhurried dog walks lasting 1.5 to 2 hours through the most beautiful streets and parks in central Paris. Every dog is treated as family with personalised care, small groups or solo walks, and positive reinforcement methods. Founded by a former corporate professional who left the office to do what makes dogs (and their humans) happiest.

## Services

- 1.5 hour premium dog walk: 45€
- 2 hour premium dog walk: 60€
- Solo walks or social walks with Zozò
- Positive reinforcement training methods
- WhatsApp photo updates during walks

## Walking Areas

- 6th arrondissement: Jardin du Luxembourg, Rue de Fleurus, Place Saint-Sulpice, Rue de Vaugirard
- 7th arrondissement: Esplanade des Invalides, Rue Cler, Rue de Grenelle, Champ de Mars
- 5th arrondissement: Jardin des Plantes, Rue Mouffetard, Arènes de Lutèce, Square René Viviani

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +447712622536
- Website: https://panda-zozo.com
- Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Panda+and+Zozò+-+Dog+Walking+Service/
